title: Diffusion Models explained..
summary: Video explains diffusion models as a process and framework rather than a fixed architecture, covering their progression, strengths, weaknesses, and theoretical foundations. Discusses how diffusion can be implemented with transformers such as DiT, and explores the concept from multiple angles.
